channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pothole on Bethesda St, 8th April
item.description:
This was marked as fixed a few months ago but now it is back.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bath Terrace, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of potholes, 8th April
item.description:
They've been here for months and the road is only getting worse. It's impossible to avoid them.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Place, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple deep potholes along the whole stretch of road, 8th April
item.description:
Multiple deep pots holes starting just before the turning of blaisdon way all the way down to the turning of pilgrims way the whole road needs resurfacing as pot holes keep reappearing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Hayden Road, Hesters Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Melody Way, parked opposite driveway for flats 9-14, 8th April
item.description:
Vehicle has been parked up and not moved for over 4 weeks and obstructing driveway for near flats which has been causing issues when trying to exit driveways.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Melody Way, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollard light flickering on Hewlett Road, 8th April
item.description:
Bollard light flickering on Hewlett Road Roundabout, outside Nasprias and Rainbowls etc

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, All Saints' Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes and surface erosion where pervious patch works have been carried out, 8th April
item.description:
All across Clevedon Square

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 47, Somerset Avenue, Rowanfield, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole near junction, 8th April
item.description:
Near the junction of Somerset Ave and Dorset Ave

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 47, Somerset Avenue, Rowanfield, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wooden pallet topped with metal and plastic waste, 8th April
item.description:
Wooden pallet topped with metal and plastic waste in the public footpath next to 1 Valley Cottages Gloucester Road Staveetin Cheltenham GL51 0TF. Wasn't there at 12pm today.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Gloucester Road, Golden Valley, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in clevedon square, impossible to miss when parking., 8th April
item.description:
What3words: tribes.amount.pets

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clevedon Square, Rowanfield, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge hole in the road., 8th April
item.description:
Just outside laundry business, its been there for weeks, If I end up getting damage I will be filing for compensation. SORT IT OUT!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 219, Hatherley Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole cover surrounded in pothole, 8th April
item.description:
Two meters into to malthouse lane around the manhole cover has now been reported multiple times and has been since end of February waiting for fix. You can’t avoid it when you turn into road as cars come from back lane have hit my wheel rims three times this week alone.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Malthouse Lane, Winchcombe, Winchcombe
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead tree now taken down (twigs and branches left all over lawn) but now lawn has tree stump - this is a trip hazard and also does not allow for easy mowing of this area! Please remove asap., 8th April
item.description:
59 Kempton Grove, GL51 0JU

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 85, Kempton Grove, Golden Valley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 20 inch pothole adjacent to 161 salisbury avenue. Bus causing house to shake on this and broken drainage run across the road!, 8th April
item.description:
Outside of 161 Salisbury Avenue Warden Hill GL51 3DG. Thanks for prompt fill and make good action. Cllr cc
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 122, Salisbury Avenue, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drainage pipe exposed due to damaged pavement, 8th April
item.description:
Hi there - the rain drainage pipe outside my house is exposed due to the pavement being damaged and the pipe is also now damaged. Is it your responsibility to fix this? Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Millbrook Street, Alstone, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Flytipped items, 8th April
item.description:
Halfway up White Hart Street there is parts of a bed, a small suitcase, wooden panels, and large cement blocks flytipped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, White Hart Street, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal fire ash/debris, 8th April
item.description:
Needs clearing as blocking the path

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cassin Drive, Golden Valley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waste bags, 8th April
item.description:
Bags of small gas bottles on the bank.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Larkhay Road, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Flytipping (not witnessed and no evidence likely)

item.title: Litter in brook, 8th April
item.description:
Lots of litter in brook Glass and plastic bottles, broken chair, footballs, plastic I'm concerned for the wildlife and dogs that go in the brook. Children also play in this area. It has been like this for many months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A40, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Litter in street or public area

item.title: When are going to fix this?, 8th April
item.description:
Dangerous road to drive on. This has been reported so many times and no one is doing anything about it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Hesters Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 8th April
item.description:
Depression CW 1500x600x40mm approx 2 way lights Stats X 4 NSD (CW6 Rutting&Depressions)
Report on FixMyStreet
